B.Tech 1st Year Viva Questions Download |PDF| 2. Video Links of Important Topics (B.Tech. 1st Year) POLYMER CHEMISTRY Polymer Chemistry - (Chemistry and Biochemistry course from IIT Kharagpur) NPTEL Lecture Videos by Dr. D. Dhara from IIT Kharagpur. Click on any Lecture link to view that video. These videos are provided NPTEL e-learning initiative. https://www.nptelvideos.com/course.php?id=246 ATOMIC STRUCTURES Atomic Structure & Chemical Bonding, IIT Madras by Prof. K. Mangala Sundara. https://archive.nptel.ac.in/courses/104/106/104106096/ STEREOCHEMISTRY Department Of Chemistry, IIT Kharagpur By Prof. Amit Basak. https://nptel.ac.in/courses/104105086 SPECTROSCOPIC TECHNIQUES AND APPLICATIONS Advance Analytical Course - (Chemistry and Biochemistry course from IIT Kanpur) NPTEL Lecture Videos by Dr. Padma S Vankar from IIT Kanpur. Click on any Lecture link to view that video. These videos are provided by the NPTEL e-learning initiative. https://onlinecourses.nptel.ac.in/noc20_cy18/preview NANOTECHNOLOGY Nanostructured materials-synthesis, Properties, Self-assembly and applications,IIT Delhi Prof. A.K. Ganguli. https://nptel.ac.in/courses/118102003 LUBRICANTS IIT Delhi, By Prof. Harish Hirani. https://nptel.ac.in/courses/112102014 CORROSION Advances in corrosion engineering IISc Bangalore, By Prof. K.A. Natarajan https://nptel.ac.in/courses/113108051 WATER Water resources engineering, IIT Kharagpur By Prof. Rajesh Shrivastava https://nptel.ac.in/courses/105104103 3.
